headlines.title: Three more Iran football team members change minds over asylum
headlines.description: Four of seven members of the women's football delegation who originally sought to stay in Australia have now chosen to return home.

headlines.title: A finale worthy of the greatest Six Nations in history
headlines.description: History, records, upsets, high-scoring classics - and a thrilling finale. The 2026 Six Nations is likely to go down as the best edition in the tournament's history.

headlines.title: We expect government help in a crisis. Will Reeves intervene on energy bills this time?
headlines.description: After Covid furlough and Truss’s bailout, can the UK expect another government crisis rescue, asks Laura Kuenssberg.

headlines.title: UK must build own nuclear missiles to end reliance on US, say Lib Dems
headlines.description: Sir Ed Davey is calling on the government to start work on a "fully independent British nuclear deterrent".

headlines.title: London's Burning actor John Alford dies in prison
headlines.description: The 54-year-old former star of Grange Hill and London's Burning was found dead at HMP Bure in Norfolk.

headlines.title: Oscars 2026: What to expect, how to watch and who will win
headlines.description: Sinners, One Battle After Another and Hamnet will all be vying for Hollywood's highest honour on Sunday.

headlines.title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
headlines.description: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".

headlines.title: 'Gruesome' war bets fuel calls for crackdown on prediction markets
headlines.description: Predictions markets have hosted millions of dollars of bets related to the war in Iran.

headlines.title: F1 cancels Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix
headlines.description: The Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix weekends are cancelled because of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

headlines.title: An eccentric new friend entered her life. Then things took a strange, expensive turn
headlines.description: What began as a dog-sitting favour ended with boutique owner Bridget Hutchcroft being owed more than £1.6m.

headlines.title: My letter to my dead daughter - after forgiving the man who killed her
headlines.description: The mother of Ann Grosmaire, 19, who was shot dead by her boyfriend, explains why she chose restorative justice.

headlines.title: Sculpting jaws, giving scores: Inside the world of looksmaxxing
headlines.description: Growing numbers of young men are going to great lengths to achieve what they see as the perfect face.

headlines.title: The women bringing chess into the 21st Century - with 'bullet' matches and viral videos
headlines.description: Women content creators are helping chess shake its image as an "old man's game" and bring it into the digital age.

headlines.title: Banknotes, beavers and a very British backlash
headlines.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

headlines.title: Police-style powers to tackle fly-tippers being considered
headlines.description: The move would allow officers to search premises without a warrant, seize assets and arrest those suspected of criminality.

headlines.title: BBC comedy spotlights a romantic dilemma some disabled people face
headlines.description: Co-creator and star of We Might Regret This, Kyla Harris on delving into issues rarely seen on screen.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Starmer may send drones to the Gulf' and 'Panic hits the pumps'
headlines.description: A mix of stories on Sunday's papers, with the war in the Middle East remaining prominent.

headlines.title: Will Trump help or hinder Zimbabwe's white farmers in their compensation battle?
headlines.description: They have engaged a lobbying firm with close ties to the US president to argue their case.

headlines.title: Murder investigation launched after baby's death
headlines.description: A 43-year-old woman was arrested at the scene on suspicion of murder and remains in police custody.

headlines.title: Treasure hunter freed from jail after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
headlines.description: Tommy Thompson spent more than a decade in prison after refusing to disclose the whereabouts of 500 missing gold coins.

headlines.title: I died and came back to life. Now I just want to feel joy every day
headlines.description: Grace Victory says she is more content than ever after spending three months in a coma.

headlines.title: Woman reunited with stolen dog after eight years
headlines.description: Rebecca Harvey says it was an emotional moment when she was reunited with Flora.

headlines.title: Man sails around world in boat he built in his shed
headlines.description: Adam Waugh, from Northumberland, says he feels "on top of the world" after his mammoth journey.

headlines.title: 'Extinct' butterfly found across southern England
headlines.description: There has been a flurry of early sightings of the large tortoiseshell butterfly, a charity says.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Will Putin Benefit From The Iran War?
headlines.description: After two weeks of war in Iran, will Russia gain from looser sanctions and expensive oil?

headlines.title: Is Cuba Trump’s next target after Iran?
headlines.description: The US president threatens Cuba with a “friendly takeover”

headlines.title: A finale worthy of the greatest Six Nations in history
headlines.description: History, records, upsets, high-scoring classics - and a thrilling finale. The 2026 Six Nations is likely to go down as the best edition in the tournament's history.

headlines.title: Gordon hits back at 'complete nonsense' from Rooney and Shearer
headlines.description: Newcastle United's match-winner against Chelsea, Anthony Gordon, responds to "complete nonsense" from pundits Wayne Rooney and Alan Shearer.

headlines.title: How Sancho's dream Man Utd move became a nightmare
headlines.description: Jadon Sancho is set to leave Manchester United this summer, almost three years after his last Premier League appearance for the club.

headlines.title: Stellar showing and ultimate defeat increases intrigue around England
headlines.description: England put in a superb showing against France, only adding to the intrigue around a dismal Six Nations campaign overall

headlines.title: Unbalanced Man City cling to faint title hopes as Haaland struggles
headlines.description: Saturday evening, when Arsenal earned a dramatic late win over Everton before Man City were held at West Ham, felt as if it could be pivotal in the Premier League title race.

headlines.title: After 'tropical' weather, should the Winter Paralympics be moved?
headlines.description: With more sunshine seen than snow at the Winter Paralympics, calls for the Games to move in the calendar grow stronger.
